description: Exp 3 per-condition scoring contract — defines extraction method for elements AND composition-structure
rationale: Extends Exp 1 scoring contract with composition-structure dimension. AXON composition-structure scored via AST walking (machine); all other conditions use 3-judge panel. Element scoring reuses Exp 1 extractors.

scoring_dimensions.elements: Standard element presence (identity, intent, composition-step, metadata). Scored per Exp 1 contract.
scoring_dimensions.composition_structure: NEW: Structural relationships between steps. Primary DV for Exp 3.

extraction_methods.machine_ast: AXON AST walking for composition operators (-> & | <- ! ~). Binary PRESENT/ABSENT.
extraction_methods.machine_text: Text pattern matching for structural keywords in non-AXON structured formats. Partial — supplements judge scoring.
extraction_methods.judge: 3-judge LLM panel using composition_judge_prompt.txt. Verdicts: PRESENT/ABSENT/INCORRECT.
extraction_methods.hybrid: Machine text extraction as pre-filter, judge confirms. Used for JSON FC and FIPA-ACL composition-structure.

axon.composition_structure: machine_ast — walk AST for BinaryExpr nodes with op in {->, &, |, <-} and CallExpr with func in {!, ~, neg}

json_fc.elements: machine — reuse Exp 1 JSON FC extractor
json_fc.composition_structure: hybrid — text pattern matching for structural keywords, judge confirms relationships
json_fc.nesting_depth: judge — estimated from structural keyword depth

fipa_acl.composition_structure: hybrid — text pattern matching in :content, judge confirms

free_english.composition_structure: judge — assess structural relationships using composition_judge_prompt.txt

aisp.elements: judge — reuse Exp 1 judge panel (exploratory, post-prereg)
aisp.composition_structure: judge — assess structural relationships in AISP block structure
aisp.note: AISP added as exploratory 7th condition. Results reported separately, uncorrected.

cross_validation.description: 30 AXON composition-structure outputs also scored by judges
cross_validation.selection: Stratified: 1 per task (9) x 3 runs, plus 3 extra from L3 tasks
cross_validation.action_if_below: Review AST extraction rules, fix, re-run. If still below 0.85, expand to full judge scoring.

primary_dv.name: composition_success_rate
primary_dv.note: Each output yields a proportion (0 to 1). This is the primary DV for the GLMM.

secondary_dvs.name: element_rate
secondary_dvs.note: Standard element presence rate (replicates Exp 1 methodology)

secondary_dvs.name: nesting_depth
secondary_dvs.note: Only for L2+L3 tasks. Poisson GLMM.
